;<span id="Final_drill_queue">final drill queue</span>
:queue of [[Glossary:Element|elements]] that scored a grade below '''Good (4)''' in repetitions. This queue is used to review poorly scoring [[Glossary:Element|elements]] at the end of the learning day. For this queue to be generated, '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Options]] : [[Learning tab in Options|Learning]] : [[Learning tab in Options#Skip_final_drill|Skip final drill]]''' must be unchecked. As you progress with [[Glossary:Incremental_learning|incremental learning]] and build up a solid [[Glossary:Overload|overload]], the [[Glossary:Final_drill|final drill]] plays lesser and lesser role. Advanced users with [[Glossary:Overload|high learning overload]] should skip the [[Glossary:Final_drill|final drill]] entirely. However, if you are cramming for a deadline, '''final drill''' may be indispensable
